reading_response_template.title: English 8 – Reading Response Template
reading_response_template.subtitle: Reusable close-reading and written-response layout
reading_response_template.learning_target: I can read closely and respond with clear reasoning and evidence.
reading_response_template.directions: Read the text, think about the prompt, and respond in complete sentences.
reading_response_template.prompt: Insert a passage, quotation, image prompt, or discussion question here.

vocabulary.definition: an answer or position you can support
an explanation of how the evidence connects

questions.q_text: What is the main idea of the text?
How does your evidence connect to your thinking?

success_criteria: I used details or ideas from the text.
I checked my work for spelling and grammar.

cer_template.title: Cross-Curricular CER Template
cer_template.subtitle: Claim, evidence, and reasoning organizer
cer_template.question: What are you answering?
cer_template.learning_target: I can make a clear claim and support it.
cer_template.directions: Use evidence and explain your reasoning.
success_criteria: I explained how my evidence supports my claim.

organizer_template.title: Graphic Organizer Template Pack
organizer_template.subtitle: Reusable thinking tools for English, science, socials, and Careers
organizer_template.prompt: Use these layouts to organize ideas before writing, speaking, or discussing.
success_criteria: I organized my ideas before writing.
I chose a layout that matched the task.

exit_reflection_template.title: Exit Ticket + Reflection Template
exit_reflection_template.subtitle: Reusable quick-check page for any subject
exit_reflection_template.learning_target: I can explain what I learned today.
exit_reflection_template.prompt: Show one thing you learned today.
success_criteria: I named one thing I learned.
